mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, table_name, table_comment, class_name, module_name, base_package, resource_key, status, version, delete_marker, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from sys_gen_table
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from sys_gen_table
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_gen_table (id, tenant_id, table_name, table_comment, class_name, module_name, base_package, resource_key, status, version, delete_marker, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, options_json) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tableComment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{basePackage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resourceKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{optionsJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into sys_gen_table
id,
tenant_id,
table_name,
table_comment,
class_name,
module_name,
base_package,
resource_key,
status,
version,
delete_marker,
create_time,
update_time,
create_by,
update_by,
options_json,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tableComment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{basePackage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{resourceKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{optionsJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update sys_gen_table
id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
table_name = #{row.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
table_comment = #{row.tableComment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
class_name = #{row.className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
module_name = #{row.moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
base_package = #{row.basePackage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resource_key = #{row.resourceKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
options_json = #{row.optionsJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update sys_gen_table set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, table_name = #{row.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, table_comment = #{row.tableComment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, class_name = #{row.className,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, module_name = #{row.moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, base_package = #{row.basePackage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resource_key = #{row.resourceKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, options_json = #{row.optionsJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update sys_gen_table set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{row.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, table_name = #{row.tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, table_comment = #{row.tableComment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, class_name = #{row.className,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, module_name = #{row.moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, base_package = #{row.basePackage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resource_key = #{row.resourceKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update sys_gen_table
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
table_name = #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
table_comment = #{tableComment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
class_name = #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
module_name = #{moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
base_package = #{basePackage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resource_key = #{resourceKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
options_json = #{optionsJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sys_gen_table set tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, table_name = #{tableName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, table_comment = #{tableComment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, class_name = #{className,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, module_name = #{moduleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, base_package = #{basePackage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resource_key = #{resourceKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, options_json = #{optionsJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
